COMING SOON

How to get AnImaginary Pass?

  • Participate in community events
  • Given by various different communities
  • Be active on X

How to Redeem?

Connect to our farming dashboard with X and redeem your Imaginary Pass codes under the Imaginary Pass section.

05

Get An Imaginary Pass

introducing

Bubble Points

Starting from 22 December 2023 2pm (local time), we are excited to announce a simple change: we're renaming all Bubble Rangers' in-game bubbles to "Bubble Points".

This update is designed to eliminate any potential confusion with our coin, $BUBBLE.

So, what does this mean for you?

Your accumulated Bubble Points will be eligible to be converted into $BUBBLE at a future date.

Keep an eye out for upcoming announcements on how and when you are eligible to convert your Bubble Points to $BUBBLE.
